h2: A linear fireplace is the perfect complement to modern interior design style. Clean lines are just the beginning, as heat management technology makes it safe to install your TV above your fireplace, with mere inches in between. Upgrade your media wall with a linear fireplace that makes fire a stunning focal point of your home.
Cosmo, the Fireplace for Every Room
Traditional or Modern? How to Choose

paragraphs: A linear fireplace is the perfect complement to modern interior design style. Clean lines are just the beginning, as heat management technology makes it safe to install your TV above your fireplace, with mere inches in between. Upgrade your media wall with a linear fireplace that makes fire a stunning focal point of your home.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai double-sided outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48" or 60" widths, with this double-sided configuration that adapts seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.

The Triton electric fireplace is a showstopper with its impressive 20" tall glass and modern, built-in design. Available in 50", 65" and 78" lengths and three configurations, (one-sided, two-sided corner, three-sided bay) it adapts to any space and style. You can even link multiple units together for unlimited length, extra warmth and bold, continuous flames across a striking feature wall.

Enjoy a sophisticated fire at a smaller footprint, thanks to the sleek design of the Cosmo gas linear fireplace. Personalize the look with a range of fronts, log sets and interior options. Heat management makes it safe to install your TV above the fireplace, with just mere inches in between. Available in 32, 36 and 42-inch widths.

The Format is the best electric fireplace for sleek, minimal style that requires zero hassle to hang. With its floating mantel, this white electric fireplace provides glow from LED flames, as well as moody mantel downlighting. Enjoy it year-round with or without heat. Available in 43-inch, 50-inch, and 60-inch fireplace widths.

Think outside the box, inside your space. The Mezzo Double-Sided fireplace provides one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by dynamic, end-to-end ribbon flames. Choose from seven fire bed materials and two log sets to create a stunning interior room divider. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The Scion is a linear electric fireplace with a sophisticated design, including a modern, minimal front trim, no visible heater, and a built-in look with 16" tall glass for a stunning view. Your choice of crystal media or driftwood logs complements vibrant LED flames and customizable ember bed colors, creating a captivating ambiance that’s tailored to your interior design style. Available in 43 and 55-inch widths.

The SimpliFire Forum outdoor electric fireplace expands your livable space. Designed to withstand long sun-exposure and weather the elements, the Forum frees up your outdoor area of propane tanks, gas lines and wood. Enjoy the flexibility and ambiance of placing this heat-free fire feature on any deck or patio. Available in 43-inch and 55-inch fireplace widths.

With the modern design of the Allusion Platinum, you can easily create a cozy atmosphere with an optional build-out kit or wall-mount kit, or enjoy a built-in, flush design installed by pros. Use this electric fireplace year-round, with or without heat. Available in 50-inch, 60-inch, and 72-inch fireplace widths.

Lifelike digital flames flicker and crackle over glowing logs and embers, delivering all the cozy feels within a modern fireplace design. A sleek profile and subtle heat vents keep the focus on the fire, while slide-in installation and an optional build-out kit make it easy to integrate beautifully. Choose your favorite flame look, control it by remote or app, and enjoy with or without heat all year long. Available in 50, 60, 78 and 100-inch widths.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48", 60" or 72" widths, with single- or double-sided configurations that adapt seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.

Elevate two spaces at once. Whether an interior room divider or a beautiful bridge for indoor-outdoor living, the Primo II gas linear fireplace is a stunning addition. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace, with mere inches in between. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The Allusion Slim electric fireplace beautifully bridges technology and style. The ultra-sleek, four-inch depth is one of the slimmest out there, able to be completely recessed into a 2x4 or 2x6 wall, without taking up additional floor space. It’s easy to add this fireplace in almost any room (no construction needed) with the optional wall-mount & surround kit. Available in 40-inch, 50-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
From contemporary, sleek designs to more traditional looking fireplaces, linear fireplaces offer something for everyone.
Clean-lined, contemporary and beautiful, this modern linear gas fireplace fits in everywhere.
Blogger and new home buyer Rachael Dorr walks us through her fireplace selection process.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
